The biggest change from April 2026 is the implementation of the new Income Tax Act 2025.
This replaces the old Income Tax Act, 1961.
This change is aimed at making taxation more understandable for common taxpayers.
New rules have been introduced to update deductions and allowances.

Now: ₹3,000 per month

Now: ₹15,000 per year

Now: Tax-free up to ₹8 lakh income
Income up to ₹4 lakh → No tax

Quality matters more, but 3–5 focused hours are enough.

You can improve your performance quickly.

Because success in exams is not luck —
